form.formComment: Resuming after a six months break. Not seen since he finished last of 8 at Nort-sur-Erdre October 5 over 1800m, 12 len behind Larqana carrying 53.5kg. On debut sixth of 8 at Chateaubriant July 23 over 1950m, 16 len behind Khadidja carrying 54.5kg at $36. Others make more appeal.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-14). Resuming after a six months break. Not seen since he finished last of 8 at Nort-sur-Erdre October 5 over 1800m, 12 len behind Larqana carrying 53.5kg. On debut sixth of 8 at Chateaubriant July 23 over 1950m, 16 len behind Khadidja carrying 54.5kg at $36. Others make more appeal.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after three months ran last of 12 at Le Mans on March 20 over 1950m, on a slow track; 48 len behind Xclusivite carrying 58kg at $37. Previously second-up 9th of 12 at Amiens on November 10 over 2200m, in the wet; 28 len behind Lysithrea carrying 55.5kg at $122. Hard to get excited about his chances.

form.formComment: Resumes. Finished off last campaign seventh of 11 at Amiens November 19 over 2200m, on heavy track; 27 len behind Queen's Angel with 54kg at $7.20. Previously first up; sixth of 9 at Fontainebleau September 21 over 3000m, soft track; 6 len behind Trevor Senora carrying 66kg at $20. Sure to be thereabouts.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2.5). Resumes. Finished off last campaign seventh of 11 at Amiens November 19 over 2200m, on heavy track; 27 len behind Queen's Angel with 54kg at $7.20. Previously first up; sixth of 9 at Fontainebleau September 21 over 3000m, soft track; 6 len behind Trevor Senora carrying 66kg at $20. Sure to be thereabouts.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up made some head-way from midfield; 3rd of 15 at Le Mans on March 4 over 1950m, 1.5 len behind Hey Man with 56.5kg at $7.80. Second-up 12th of 16 at Chantilly All Weather on March 30 over 1900m, 11 len behind Antinea carrying 54.5kg at $23. Certainly worth another chance.

formComments.title: TAB

Second-up 12th of 16 at Chantilly All Weather on March 30 over 1900m, 11 len behind Antinea carrying 54.5kg at $23. Certainly worth another chance.

form.formComment: Most recently 6th of 9 at Montlucon-Neris on March 22 over 2300m, 11 len behind Pisorno with 65kg. The run before that 2nd of 15 at Deauville All Weather on January 22 over 2500m, head behind Eclair De Vati with 59kg at $7.70. Can atone.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months 6th of 14 at Pornichet on March 25 over 2400m, 6 len behind In The Army Now carrying 49.5kg at $29. Previously second-up didn't finish the race at Senonnes-Pouanc? July 9 over 2300m. Expecting him to kick on with that first run out of the way.

form.formComment: Most recently 11th of 14 at Compiegne on March 27 over 2000m, on a slow track; 9 len behind Summer Flirt with 52.5kg at $51. form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. First-up got back early 10th of 15 at Pau All Weather on February 23 over 2000m, 4.5 len behind Hariasa carrying 51.5kg at $55. Second-up 4th of 16 at La Teste De Buch on March 21 over 1900m, on a slow track; 3 len behind Bojangles carrying 52kg at $37. Well placed to take this out.
